source_pr.title: store/mockstore/unistore/lockstore, store/mockstore/unistore/util/lockwaiter: migrate test-infra to testify
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: ref #27652

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

- Migrate predicates to testify
- Replace `time.Sleep()` to `sync.WaitGroup` in `store/mockstore/unistore/lockstore.TestConcurrent(t *testing.T)` to reduce time
- `TestConcurrent` takes at least 10s, so change its name to be less general, and add it to timeout whitelist

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test(#26235) and bring it back before 2021-07-29.")
failure_signature: - c.Skip("Skip this unstable test(#26235) and bring it back before 2021-07-29.")
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it used a fixed sleep to synchronize goroutines (sleeping 100ms after closing the channel) before checking shared structures. Under load, the fixed sleep could be insufficient, causing intermittent races/false failures. This PR stabilizes it by replacing the sleep-based synchronization with a WaitGroup and waiting for all reader goroutines to finish.
fix_pattern: Replace fixed time.Sleep-based goroutine coordination with WaitGroup synchronization to deterministically wait for readers to exit before assertions.
